subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-05-10 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Behold what abounding ecstasy the Covenant of the Abha Beauty has kindled within the people, and how it has caused the believers to gather together
subcodes.first_line_orig: ببینید چه شور و ولوله ای از تأثیر میثاق جمال ابهی در نفوس افتاده
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @growth of the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity
